# Version 3.0.0
> **Rolled up into 3.116.0** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.0.0-preview)

> **Superseded by [3.116.0](3.116.0.md)** · Never released as stable — these changes rolled up into 3.116.0.

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.0.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.0/index.md)

## Highlights

Preview 3.0.0 was the v3 line that never shipped stable — its work was renumbered and released as 3.116.0.

## Breaking Changes

- **Obsolete v2 APIs removed** — Every member marked [Obsolete] in SkiaSharp 2 was removed on this line — the legacy GRContext.Create/GRGlInterface.Assemble* factories, SKBitmap.GetAddr*/Index8 helpers, the InstallPixels overload that took an SKColorTable, and GetRecommendedSampleCount/SetResourceCacheLimits. Migrate to the replacement each obsolete attribute pointed at (CreateGl/CreateOpenGl/GetPixel/GetResourceCacheLimit). ([#2539](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2539))
- **SKFilterQuality replaced by SKSamplingOptions** — The v2 SKFilterQuality drawing paths were replaced with SKSamplingOptions in v3, with compatibility overloads that keep SKFilterQuality-based calls compiling. ([#2963](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2963), [#2924](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2924))

## Engine

- **Skia milestone 116** — Bumps the bundled Skia through milestones 115 and 116. — ❤️ [@Redth](https://github.com/Redth) ([#2829](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2829), [#2885](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2885), [#3026](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3026))

## API Surface

- **SKBlender, richer SKPicture, Skottie** — Exposes SKBlender, the R-tree BeginRecording overload, additional SKPicture APIs, SKImage.ToRawShader, and binds the Skottie Animation.Builder. ([#2830](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2830), [#2889](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2889), [#2883](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2883), [#2748](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2748), [#2630](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2630))
- **Span overloads and platform views** — Adds Span<T> overloads across color filters, SetRectRadii and GetPixelSpan, and lands new views: SKGLElement for WPF, SKGLView for MAUI, WinUI accelerated views and DPI on the Blazor components. — ❤️ [@Youssef1313](https://github.com/Youssef1313), [@gmurray81](https://github.com/gmurray81), [@beto-rodriguez](https://github.com/beto-rodriguez) ([#2879](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2879), [#2949](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2949), [#2609](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2609), [#2317](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2317), [#2598](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2598), [#2733](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2733), [#1832](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/1832))
- **Function pointers and LibraryImport** — Rewrites the interop layer around function pointers and LibraryImport for AOT and trimming. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2917](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2917))

## Bug Fixes

- **Xaml, Uno and Metal fixes** — Fixes the SKXamlCanvas XamlRoot lifetime, the Uno Bgra8888 canvas, the WASM canvas lookup, Mac Catalyst Metal and Apple Metal Snapshot returning magenta. — ❤️ [@jeromelaban](https://github.com/jeromelaban), [@Youssef1313](https://github.com/Youssef1313), [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#2854](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2854), [#2918](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2918), [#2559](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2559), [#2747](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2747), [#2804](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2804))
- **Memory and API correctness** — Fixes MAUI view memory leaks, the cloned SKPaint AVE, and the GetKerningPairAdjustments API, and restores the v2.88.8 SKBitmap.Encode PNG behaviour. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid), [@pdjonov](https://github.com/pdjonov), [@sungaila](https://github.com/sungaila) ([#2955](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2955), [#2904](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2904), [#2858](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2858), [#3014](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3014))

## Platform

- **.NET 9 and modern workloads** — Adds .NET 9 support alongside .NET 8, updates SDK/workloads/projects, and refreshes the WinForms GLControl packages. — ❤️ [@jeromelaban](https://github.com/jeromelaban) ([#3010](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3010), [#2927](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2927), [#2971](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2971), [#2989](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2989))
- **Metal on a common TFM and AOT hardening** — Brings the Metal APIs onto a common .NET TFM, updates IBufferByteAccess for AOT, and marks PlatformConfiguration properties trimmable. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2788), [#2920](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2920), [#2717](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2717))

## Security

- **Bundled native dependencies refreshed** — Updates HarfBuzz to 8.3.0, libwebp to 1.3.2, and libjpeg-turbo to 3.0.0. ([#2624](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2624), [#2622](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2622), [#2583](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2583))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0

Refreshes HarfBuzz to 8.3.0 and picks up the .NET 9 support and function-pointer interop rewrite in the HarfBuzzSharp binding. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2917](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2917), [#2971](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2971), [#2927](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2927), [#2730](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2730), [#2582](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2582), [#2539](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2539), [#2505](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2505))

## Preview 5 (October 24, 2024)

Preview 5 added .NET 9 support, .NET 8 workload updates, the SKFilterQuality compatibility overloads, and fixed MAUI view memory leaks.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.4.1...v3.0.0-preview.5.4)

## Preview 4 (July 18, 2024)

Preview 4 added SKBlender, the R-tree BeginRecording overload, more SKPicture APIs, the color-filter Span overloads, and fixed the AVE in cloned SKPaint dispose.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.3.1...v3.0.0-preview.4.1)

## Preview 3 (April 9, 2024)

Preview 3 brought the Metal APIs onto a common TFM, added SKGLElement for WPF and DPI on the Blazor components.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.2.1...v3.0.0-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (February 20, 2024)

Preview 2 bound the Skottie Animation.Builder, added SKImage.ToRawShader, and switched Mac Catalyst to Metal.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.1.8...v3.0.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (February 6, 2024)

Preview 1 modernised the repository, removed the [Obsolete] v2 surface, and refreshed the packaging.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v2.88.9...v3.0.0-preview.1.8)
